creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm going to close this one, rather than do the work to merge it, with 
two notes for the submitter: 

- GNATS is very picky about Subject: lines.  Note the way I've corrected 
it in this response. 

- We require port updates to be submitted with diff -r rather than with 
a sharfile.  sharfiles are only for new ports.  With the diff, the 
committer can more quickly see what he or she is being asked to commit, 
and thus will be resonbile for.
